data.description:
## Description

**What**: Add an inference-challenge prompt mode to dso:red-team-reviewer with tiered sampling, structured envelope emission, affects_fields classification, and configurable sampling rates.

**Why**: SC2 requires that every red-team-reviewer invocation emits a typed envelope (never silence) to close the self-attestation bypass gap. SC3 requires challenges to surface as ticket comments. SC5 makes rates tunable with safety floors.

**Scope**:
- IN: Inference-challenge mode in plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md; INFERENCE_CHALLENGE and INFERENCE_SKIP envelope emission (silence treated as dispatch bug); affects_fields classifier with >=100 hand-labeled fixture at tests/fixtures/affects-fields-classifier.json (>=50 high-stakes, >=50 rationale-only labeled examples); tiered sampling (100% for gate_verdicts/workflow_completion_checklist, 20% deterministic for rationale-text-only via hash(decision_id) mod 5 == 0); config keys preconditions.inference_review.rate_rationale (default 20) and rate_high_stakes (default 100) in dso-config.conf; config validator rejects rate_high_stakes < 100 with non-zero exit; ticket comment emission with payload {decision_id, challenge_type, evidence_against_inference, user_confirmation_required}; update ALL existing dispatch sites of dso:red-team-reviewer to specify mode explicitly (so inference-challenge mode never silently changes the preplanning Phase 2.5 story-review envelope)
- OUT: Brainstorm Phase 1 Gate (S2); recall measurement (S4); dogfooding (S5)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, dso:red-team-reviewer never returns silence; every invocation in inference-challenge mode produces either INFERENCE_CHALLENGE or INFERENCE_SKIP
  ← Satisfies: "Every invocation MUST emit a typed envelope, never silence" (SC2)
- When this story is complete, INFERENCE_SKIP includes reason field (sampling | not_in_scope) and hash_bucket field
  ← Satisfies: "INFERENCE_SKIP{reason: sampling | not_in_scope, hash_bucket: N}" (SC2)
- When this story is complete, affects_fields classifier accuracy on the high-stakes class >= 95% as measured against tests/fixtures/affects-fields-classifier.json
  ← Satisfies: "affects_fields classifier MUST be tested... required accuracy >=95% on high-stakes class" (SC2)
- When this story is complete, inference challenges surface as ticket comments with the specified structured payload {decision_id, challenge_type, evidence_against_inference, user_confirmation_required: bool}
  ← Satisfies: "Inference challenges surface as ticket comments" (SC3)
- When this story is complete, preconditions.inference_review.rate_rationale and rate_high_stakes keys exist in dso-config.conf with defaults 20 and 100 respectively; config validator rejects rate_high_stakes < 100 at config-load time with non-zero exit
  ← Satisfies: "Sampling rates tunable via dso-config.conf" (SC5)
- When this story is complete, every existing dispatch site of dso:red-team-reviewer (including preplanning Phase 2.5) is updated or verified to specify mode explicitly — no dispatch site silently inherits inference-challenge behavior
  ← Satisfies: consumer impact protection (adversarial review finding)
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] affects_fields classifier fixture requires >=100 hand-labeled examples from recent planning sessions — curation effort must be scoped in implementation plan
- [Testing] Ticket-comment emission in inference-challenge mode needs mock-compatible interface for unit tests (no real ticket system calls in test suite)
- [Maintainability] preconditions.inference_review.* config keys must be added to plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md in the same change set; floor-of-100 validator must integrate into the existing config-validation entry point (validate.sh or dedicated validator), NOT as a standalone script

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: As a planning quality reviewer, dso:red-team-reviewer emits a typed inference-challenge envelope on every invocation so inference-sourced decisions are adversarially reviewed before they affect planning outcomes
